scripts.dev: concurrently -n GATE,AUTH,EVNT,PROJ,WEB -c green,cyan,magenta,blue,yellow "pnpm --filter podium-gateway dev" "pnpm --filter podium-auth-service start:dev" "pnpm --filter podium-events-service start:dev" "pnpm --filter podium-projects-service start:dev" "PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000/api pnpm --filter podium-frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @podium/shared build && pnpm --filter podium-auth-service build && pnpm --filter podium-events-service build && pnpm --filter podium-projects-service build && pnpm --filter podium-frontend build
